_comment2: Edit the values below to configure the extractor for your song

tempo._comment: Tempo in beats per minute (from the score)

time_signature._comment: Time signature (e.g., 3/4 means 3 beats per measure, quarter note gets the beat)

calibration._comment: Number of measures each pillar plays alone for mic delay calibration

_pillar_order_comment: Order of pillars for calibration windows (clockwise from front left)
_pillar_musicxml_mapping_comment: Maps pillar IDs to MusicXML part IDs (the part name in the score-partwise/part-list)
_window_start_measures_comment: Starting measure numbers for each pillar's calibration window (2 measures each, in pillar_order sequence)

urls._comment: URLs for audio assets on Wix CDN

analysis_params._comment: Set use_audio_alignment to true if you want to align with recorded audio (experimental)
